supplier_info.name: Goldcar
supplier_info.dropoff_instructions:
After collecting your luggage, please call our phone number to arrange your shuttle pick-up on on 07 3006 7442 and International Dialling: +61 7 3006 7442. If you are unable to reach us by phone, proceed directly to the shuttle pick-up point. 

For International Bookings: From the arrivals hall, turn left and walk past the Coffee Club. Continue straight ahead towards the exit doors located in the far corner of the terminal. Exit the terminal and head down the ramp to your left, following the pathway to the end of the covered walkway. Cross the pedestrian crossing and wait at shuttle bay 3/4 for the Goldcar shuttle. 

For Domestic Bookings: From the baggage claim area, exit the terminal through the main doors. Walk towards the skywalk and proceed up the travelator. At the top of the travelator, turn left and walk across the skywalk to the second travelator on your right. Exit the terminal, walk across the Skywalk and go down the travelator to B1/B2 on the ground floor. Please wait here for the Goldcar shuttle to collect you.

reviews.negative:
My reservation was for Volkswagen Tiguan. 
The definition of this car category was:  MID size SUV with a capacity for 3 Large bags. 
Europcar gave me Cupra Formentor which is by any standard a small SUV or not an SUV at all.
If you look at the range of Cupra/Seat, the Ateca is the equivalent in size (mid SUV) and the Formentor is below it. 
Furthermore, There is absolutely no room for  3 Large bags (as reserved) in the Formentor.
I have pictures to support this.
Europcar were willing to change the car to station wagon to solve the 3 Large bags mismatch 
but this was not SUV and because I have a back problem, I need the SUV height.
They said they have no other SUV for me. 
So after a long flight I had no strength to continue to argue with them and I took the Formentor.
We had 3 Large bags so we drive with one of them in the cabin for 17 days!

The rate booked was inclusive of GPS. This was not clear on the voucher and so at my request Booking.com sent me an email confirming the rental included GPS
When collecting the car Budget said GPS was not included despite showing the email and wanted to charge me $21 per day. I refused and had to spend over 30 mins dealing with 3 members of staff until they finally conceded
